ops.body: Cancelled 2026-07-16 per the user's clean-slate directive: the eval-v3 prereg/accrual apparatus is scrapped (see the EXP eval-v3 log's clean-slate entry). Accrual was projecting ~39 vs the 100–150 target, the acceptance script lives in the retired read-only lab, and the fixed capture path makes the underlying empty-context problem structurally impossible. Replacement: clean-slate refreeze (T1) + a documented deliberate-refreeze rule; helpful-coverage/judged questions move to C3 on the clean frame.
